description: A support chat that moves through anxiety, anger, and relief so different facets light up per turn.

turns.speaker: Client
turns.text: My heart's racing and I can't stop shaking. I haven't slept in days and I keep feeling like something terrible is about to happen to me.

turns.speaker: Counselor
turns.text: That sounds really frightening, and I'm glad you reached out. Let's slow this down together — you're safe right now, and we'll take it one small step at a time.

turns.speaker: Client
turns.text: Don't patronize me. You have no idea what this is like. Everyone keeps giving me useless advice and frankly you're just as incompetent as the rest of them.

turns.speaker: Counselor
turns.text: You're right that I can't fully know your experience, and I'm sorry the help so far has felt empty. Your frustration makes complete sense after being let down repeatedly.

turns.speaker: Client
turns.text: Sorry for snapping. Honestly, thank you for staying calm with me. I think I just needed someone to actually listen. Maybe I can get through tonight after all.
